title: S + V + so + adj./adv. + that + S + V（結果子句）

formulas.zh: 如此...以至於...；表示程度副詞子句，說明結果

formulas.formula: so many/much/few/little + N + that + S + V
formulas.zh: 如此多/少的...以至於...；強調名詞數量的極端程度

explanation: 此句型用於表達事物達到某種程度，以至於產生相應結果。so 後接形容詞或副詞，that 引導結果子句。特殊形式為 so many/much/few/little + 名詞，強調數量之多或之少。此句型常與 such...that 混淆，需注意：so 後接形容詞/副詞/數量詞，such 後接名詞片語。使用時應確保 that 子句表達的是自然結果。

examples.eng: The movie was so exciting that everyone stayed until the end.
examples.chi: 那部電影如此精彩，以至於所有人都看到了最後。

examples.eng: He spoke so quickly that nobody could understand what he said.
examples.chi: 他說話如此快速，以至於沒有人能理解他說的話。

examples.eng: There were so many people at the concert that tickets sold out in minutes.
examples.chi: 音樂會有如此多的人，以至於票在幾分鐘內售罄。

examples.eng: The weather was so bad that the match had to be postponed.
examples.chi: 天氣如此糟糕，以至於比賽必須延期。

extension.tip: 區別 so...that 與 such...that：so 後接形容詞、副詞或 many/much/few/little + 名詞；such 後接整個名詞片語。例：so beautiful that（形容詞）vs. such a beautiful day that（名詞片語）。that 子句必須表達邏輯上的自然結果，勿使用無關連的後句。

examples.test: The book was so interesting that I finished it in one night.
examples.result: → 正確：so + 形容詞 interesting，結果合理

examples.test: ×The book was so that I finished it in one night.
examples.result: → 錯誤：so 後必須接形容詞或副詞，不能直接接 that

examples.test: There was so little time that we had to rush.
examples.result: → 正確：so little + 名詞，表數量之少

extension.note: 記憶訣竅：so 修飾形容詞/副詞本身，such 修飾名詞；so...that 強調程度，such...that 強調事物特性。

parts: that most students couldn't finish it on time.
exercises.sentence: The exam was so difficult that most students couldn't finish it on time.
exercises.translation: 考試如此困難，以至於大多數學生無法按時完成。

parts: that she arrived at school before it opened.
exercises.sentence: She ran so quickly that she arrived at school before it opened.
exercises.translation: 她跑得如此快，以至於她在學校開門前到達。

parts: that we couldn't find any seats in the restaurant.
exercises.sentence: There were so many people that we couldn't find any seats in the restaurant.
exercises.translation: 有如此多的人，以至於我們在餐廳找不到任何座位。

parts: that we had to share one dish.
exercises.sentence: The food cost so much that we had to share one dish.
exercises.translation: 食物花費如此之多，以至於我們必須共享一道菜。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的結果子句結構，完成句子。
mc_exercises.question_eng: The weather was so beautiful _______ we decided to have a picnic in the park.

options.text: such that we decided to go

mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A。本題使用『so + 形容詞 + that + 子句』結構表達結果。so 後接形容詞 beautiful，that 引導結果子句。B 項用 such that 結構錯誤，such 應接名詞片語；C 項用 which 引導非限制性關係子句，語法不當；D 項用 because of 表示原因，非結果。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 填入適當的副詞和結果子句，表達說話速度導致的結果。
mc_exercises.question_eng: She spoke _______ that I couldn't follow her explanation during the meeting.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A。『so + 副詞 + that』結構用於修飾動詞。so 後須接副詞 quickly（修飾 spoke），才能表達『說得如此快以至於』。B 項 such quick 搭配錯誤；C 項 so quick 應用副詞形式；D 項 such quickly 詞序顛倒且搭配錯誤。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的數量表達方式，填入空格。
mc_exercises.question_eng: There were _______ people at the concert _______ the venue couldn't accommodate everyone.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A。『so many + 可數名詞 + that』用於表達眾多導致的結果。people 是可數名詞複數，故用 so many；that 引導結果子句。B 項 such many 用法不當，such 不與 many 直接搭用；C 項 so much 用於不可數名詞；D 項結構錯誤，且後接 so 不合邏輯。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 辨識正確結構，區分 so...that 與 such...that 的差異用法。
mc_exercises.question_eng: The documentary was _______ informative _______ it changed the way people viewed the environmental crisis.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B。本題強調程度，使用『so + 形容詞 + that』結構。informative 是形容詞，so 修飾形容詞表達『如此...以至於』。A 項 such 應接名詞片語，不能直接修飾形容詞；C 項 such an 搭配錯誤且邏輯不通；D 項 so much 用於不可數名詞，which 非結果子句。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 這部電影很有趣，以至於我們都笑了。
translation_exercises.answer: The movie was so funny that we all laughed.
hints: 句型框架：S + V + so + adj. + that + S + V
注意：so 後接形容詞，不能用 such；that 子句需表達自然結果

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 昨天的考試這麼難，以至於很多學生都不及格。
translation_exercises.answer: The exam yesterday was so difficult that many students failed.
hints: 句型框架：S + V + so + adj. + that + S + V
常見錯誤：誤用 such difficult exam 代替 so difficult；that 後需跟完整子句（主詞+動詞）

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 他說話的速度太快了，以至於我無法跟上他的意思。
translation_exercises.answer: He spoke so quickly that I couldn't follow what he was saying.
hints: 句型框架：S + V + so + adv. + that + S + V（注意副詞修飾動詞）
提醒：so 後接副詞時，副詞修飾前面的動詞；that 子句常含否定（couldn't）表示負面結果

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 學校的暑期作業這麼多，以至於學生們整個暑假都在做功課，根本沒有時間放鬆。
translation_exercises.answer: There was so much summer homework that students spent the entire vacation doing assignments and had little time to relax.
key_points: that 引導的複合結果子句
hints: 句型框架：S + V + so much/many + N + that + S + V（強調數量之多）
提醒：so much 用於不可數名詞；that 子句可包含多個結果（and 連接）；避免誤用 such much
